content_body:
My husband and I stayed here 4 wonderful days with 2 other couples. There were so many different spaces in the home we could all be together. We ate on the deck at the large table, ate and played games at the inside dining room table, cooked together in the kitchen, watched movies downstairs on the huge TV, played pool, and sat around the fire pit. Each couple also had their own private and comfortable bedroom and bath. Everyone commented on how comfortable the beds were!

As relaxing as this house is, it was hard for me to sleep in and miss the gorgeous sunrises! I'm not normally an early riser, but I got up every morning, grabbed a freshly brewed cup of coffee, and sat on the balcony to watch the sunrise. You have to take lots of pictures because it changes so much. The view is unbelievable!

The owners have thought of everything! There were there are two Keurig machines, laundry detergent, soaps, shampoos, and paper products. There were also plenty of nice dishes, cookware, and glasses to use.

We will definitely be visiting this property again! Maybe next time we'll bring the family. Kids would love it there, too!
title: Unbelievable Mountain Sunrises!
